title: Staff Solutions Engineer
description:
What Are We Looking For?

This position represents Prompt Security, our comprehensive GenAI security platform, helping enterprise organizations safely and efficiently adopt GenAI. The company was recently acquired by SentinelOne, the AI cybersecurity leader, to further advance its Generative AI and Agentic AI security strategy. 

SentinelOne is seeking a Solutions Engineer to join our APJ go-to-market team. You'll be navigating an exciting landscape where innovation is constant, and the ability to adapt and iterate quickly is not just an advantage—it's a necessity. In this role, you will be instrumental in driving technical pre-sales activities, helping customers understand and implement our GenAI security solutions across various use cases. We're looking for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, someone eager to tackle new challenges and pivot with ease. This is more than a job; it's a journey into the future of cybersecurity, offering unparalleled opportunities for growth, learning, and impact.

What Will You Do?

  • Lead technical pre-sales engagements with enterprise customers and partners across APJ
  • Conduct product demonstrations and proof of concepts (POCs) showcasing our platform's capabilities in securing GenAI implementations
  • Provide technical expertise in security, compliance, and GenAI technologies to support the sales process
  • Work closely with customers to understand their requirements and demonstrate how our solution addresses their GenAI security challenges
  • Support partner enablement and training initiatives
  • Collaborate with product teams to provide market feedback and customer requirements

What Skills and Knowledge Should You Bring?

  • At least 10 years of experience in technical pre-sales, solutions engineering, or similar customer-facing technical roles, preferably in a cybersecurity startup company supporting enterprise accounts.
  • Strong understanding of enterprise security technologies and frameworks
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and enterprise software deployments
  • Excellent communication skills with ability to explain complex technical concepts to various audiences
  • Willingness to travel across APJ region (30-40%)

postedCompany.description:
SentinelOne is defining the future of cybersecurity through our XDR platform that automatically prevents, detects, and responds to threats in real-time. Singularity XDR ingests data and leverages our patented AI models to deliver autonomous protection. With SentinelOne, organizations gain full transparency into everything happening across the network at machine speed – to defeat every attack, at every stage of the threat lifecycle.


We are a values-driven team where names are known, results are rewarded, and friendships are formed. Trust, accountability, relentlessness, ingenuity, and OneSentinel define the pillars of our collaborative and unified global culture. We're looking for people that will drive team success and collaboration across SentinelOne. If you’re enthusiastic about innovative approaches to problem-solving, we would love to speak with you about joining our team!
postedCompany.name: SENTINEL LABS PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
